title: Multi-dimensional Indexing Structure Overview
description: A visual representation of how data points are organized and accessed in a multi-dimensional space using a tree-based index structure.
relationships: Root Node contains and points to Internal Nodes
Internal Nodes contain Hyper-rectangles and point to other Nodes
Leaf Nodes contain actual Data Points and their coordinates
The tree structure allows for efficient range and nearest-neighbor queries by pruning irrelevant branches
